team_name: NyayaScan — AI Court Judgment Analyzer & Action Plan Generator
summary: Develop an AI system, NyayaScan, that extracts key information from court judgment PDFs, ensures human verification, generates action plans, and presents the data in a dashboard for government use. The platform aims to reduce case review time, prevent missed deadlines, and provide a full audit trail.
optimization_claims: Reduces case review time from 4 hours to 30 seconds
Scalable to all 25 High Courts across India
constraints_addressed: Focuses on decision support, not full automation
